name: Original Durkee Green Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (16 oz.) cut green beans, drained
1 can condensed cream of mushroom soup
1 can (2.8 oz.) Durkee French fried onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the beans, milk, soup, pepper, and half a can of onions.
3. Pour the mixture into a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
4. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until heated through.
5. Top with the remaining onions; bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes or until the onions are golden brown.
